message:
feat(sync): add preflight guardrails for JSONL import validation

- Per-line JSON validation (Check 5) catches malformed entries before import
- Prefix mismatch guard (Check 6) prevents cross-project ID contamination
- 14 new preflight tests, 86 sync tests total pass
- Fix clippy warnings in show.rs and structured.rs
- Update dependencies (clap, tempfile, libc, predicates)
- Close beads_rust-eclx epic: all sync safety tasks complete

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
